items_flat.title_en: xAI launches Grok 4.5, optimized for coding and agentic work
items_flat.title_zh: xAI 發布 Grok 4.5，專攻程式碼與代理式任務
items_flat.summary_en: xAI announced Grok 4.5 as its smartest model to date, trained alongside Cursor data on NVIDIA GB300 clusters. It targets real-world software engineering, agentic workflows and knowledge work, with strong results on SWE-Bench Pro and related coding benchmarks, plus 2× token efficiency versus competitors.
items_flat.summary_zh: xAI 正式推出 Grok 4.5，號稱目前最強模型，結合 Cursor 資料並在 NVIDIA GB300 叢集上訓練。專注真實軟體工程、代理工作流與知識工作，在 SWE-Bench Pro 等編碼基準表現優異，token 效率達競爭對手兩倍。
items_flat.quote: Grok 4.5 is SpaceXAI's smartest model built for coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work.
items_flat.quote_zh: Grok 4.5 是 SpaceXAI 迄今最強的模型，專為編碼、代理任務與知識工作打造。

items_flat.title_en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs outline joint bioresilience approach
items_flat.title_zh: Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic Labs 公布聯合生物韌性策略
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs published their joint approach to bioresilience, detailing how frontier AI models will support prevention, detection and response to biological threats. The plan covers partnerships with governments and biosecurity labs, SynthID-style watermarking for biological sequences, and access to models for trusted partners.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic Labs 共同發布生物韌性策略，說明前沿 AI 如何協助預防、偵測與應對生物威脅。內容涵蓋與政府及生物安全實驗室合作、生物序列水印技術，以及向可信夥伴開放模型。
items_flat.quote: The global biosecurity landscape is rapidly evolving. Shifting natural ecosystems, global travel and the potential misuse of AI require greater vigilance — yet AI is also a critical tool for our response.
items_flat.quote_zh: 全球生物安全格局正快速演變。自然生態系統變遷、全球旅行與 AI 可能被濫用，都需要更高警覺——但 AI 同時也是我們應對的關鍵工具。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI releases GPT-Red for automated red-teaming and self-improvement
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 發布 GPT-Red 自動紅隊系統，強化模型自我改進
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI introduced GPT-Red, an automated red-teaming model trained via self-play to discover vulnerabilities such as prompt injections. It was used to adversarially train GPT-5.6 Sol, cutting failures on hard direct prompt-injection benchmarks by 6× compared with GPT-5.1.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-Red，以自我對弈訓練的自動紅隊模型，專門找出提示注入等漏洞。已用於對抗訓練 GPT-5.6 Sol，使困難直接提示注入基準的失敗率較 GPT-5.1 降低 6 倍。
items_flat.quote: We believe automated red-teaming unlocks a crucial form of self-improvement for safety: using today’s models to directly help make future models safer.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們相信自動紅隊開創了安全自我改進的關鍵形式：用今天的模型直接幫助未來的模型變得更安全。

items_flat.title_en: Meta begins alerting parents when teens discuss self-harm with Meta AI
items_flat.title_zh: Meta 開始在青少年與 Meta AI 討論自傷時通知家長
items_flat.summary_en: Meta announced that parents using Instagram supervision tools will now receive alerts if their teen discusses suicide or self-harm with Meta AI. Flagged conversations undergo manual review; the feature is live in the US, UK, Australia and Canada and will expand globally by year-end.
items_flat.summary_zh: Meta 宣布，使用 Instagram 家長監護工具的父母，若青少年與 Meta AI 討論自殺或自傷內容，將收到警報。標記對話會經人工審核；功能已在美、英、澳、加上線，年底前全球開放。
items_flat.quote: We’ll now let parents using Instagram supervision tools know if their teen discusses suicide or self-harm with Meta AI, and will provide expert resources to help parents approach these conversations with their teen.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們現在會通知使用 Instagram 監護工具的家長，若其青少年與 Meta AI 討論自殺或自傷內容，並提供專家資源協助家長與孩子溝通。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI raises ChatGPT custom instructions limit to 5,000 characters
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT 自訂指令上限提高至 5,000 字元
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI increased the character limit for custom instructions in ChatGPT from 1,500 to 5,000 for Plus, Pro, Enterprise, Business and Education users, allowing more detailed and persistent user personas.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT 自訂指令字元上限從 1,500 提升至 5,000（適用 Plus、Pro、Enterprise、Business 與 Education 用戶），讓使用者可設定更詳細且持久的個人化指令。

xai.title_zh: xAI 發布 Grok 4.5，專攻程式碼與代理式任務
xai.summary_en: xAI announced Grok 4.5 as its smartest model to date, trained alongside Cursor data on NVIDIA GB300 clusters. It targets real-world software engineering, agentic workflows and knowledge work, with strong results on SWE-Bench Pro and related coding benchmarks, plus 2× token efficiency versus competitors.

xai.quote: Grok 4.5 is SpaceXAI's smartest model built for coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work.
xai.quote_zh: Grok 4.5 是 SpaceXAI 迄今最強的模型，專為編碼、代理任務與知識工作打造。

brief_en: xAI launched Grok 4.5, its strongest coding and agentic model. Google DeepMind detailed a joint bioresilience strategy with Isomorphic Labs. Meta activated parental alerts for teen self-harm signals in Meta AI chats. OpenAI published GPT-Red, an automated red-teaming system that boosted GPT-5.6 robustness.
brief_zh: xAI 發布 Grok 4.5，強化程式碼與代理任務能力。Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic Labs 公布生物韌性策略。Meta 上線家長警報，偵測青少年與 Meta AI 討論自傷內容。OpenAI 發表 GPT-Red 自動紅隊系統，顯著提升 GPT-5.6 抗攻擊能力。
